candidate_check.description: Windows 11 must be configured to audit file system successes.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify that Audit File System auditing has been enabled: 

Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Advanced Audit Policy Configuration >> System Audit Policies >> Object Access >> Audit File System. 

If "Audit File System" is not set to "Success", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Advanced Audit Policy Configuration >> System Audit Policies >> Object Access >> "Audit File System" with "Success" selected.
title: Windows 11 must be configured to audit file system successes.
